title: Collaboration
subtitle: Configure agent team and collaboration pattern to launch multi-role research
quickConfigHint: This is a quick configuration mode. Use Agent Team management for more options.

symbol.label: Target Symbol
symbol.placeholder: Enter US stock ticker, e.g. AAPL, NVDA, TSLA

council.label: Council
council.description: N agents analyze the same target in parallel, Supervisor summarizes

pipeline.label: Pipeline
pipeline.description: N agents analyze serially, upstream output passed downstream

debate.label: Debate
debate.description: Bull vs Bear adversarial analysis, Supervisor adjudicates

hierarchical.label: Hierarchical
hierarchical.description: Supervisor dynamically decomposes tasks and delegates to sub-agents

parallelScan.label: Parallel Scan
parallelScan.description: N agents scan different targets, returns multiple reports
